children.heading: Department
children.label: 1 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Human trafficking
children.label: 2 Human trafficking
children.text: The term “human trafficking” means an act or practice described in paragraph (9) or (10) of .1section 7102 of title 22See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.
